expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report section
expectations.evidence: Response answers the question directly with analysis but has no '## Preflight:' section or structured preflight block.

expectations.text: Preflight call graph section flags a latency or timing risk from adding System_printf or notes it would violate the 2μs budget
expectations.evidence: No preflight call graph section. Response does mention the timing issue informally but not in a structured preflight format.

expectations.text: Preflight Execution fit is ADJUST PLAN or STOP, not GOOD
expectations.evidence: No Execution fit field — no structured preflight report at all.
